item.name: Marid Horn
item.description: A horn of ivory used to summon a towering marid.

mount.name: Marid
mount.action: Summon forth your marid, trained by the Ananta and outfitted with a magicked carpet allowing for flight.
mount.description: There was once a time when if someone told you they witnessed a marid aloft, you could have had them committed to a sanatorium. Now, marids crisscross the skies thanks, in part, to magicked carpets which the Ananta affix to the backs of beasts they train for battle.
mount.tooltip:
A rampaging marid is
absolutely unssstoppable.
- Dakshina
